title: Totem of Undying Mahito
description: Pixel-art Totem of Undying retexture inspired by Mahito, the twisted cursed spirit from Jujutsu Kaisen.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73d125867c142d9bac715e0e84492799e2d6def4.png)

# ✨ **Cursed Totem – Mahito the Idle Transfigurer**

**Embrace the chaos of cursed spirits.**
This Totem Factory DBX pack reimagines the **Totem of Undying** as **Mahito**, the twisted sorcerer of flesh and souls. A haunting pixel-art design that makes every revival feel like a curse reborn.

---

## ⭐ Features

* 🎨 **Custom Totem of Undying** retextured as *Mahito*
* 👹 Captures his unsettling cursed spirit form
* ✨ **Pixel-art style** crafted to match Minecraft’s look
* ⚡ Inspired by Mahito’s *Idle Transfiguration* technique
* 📦 Lightweight `.zip` resource pack, quick install

---

## 🔧 Installation

1. Download the `.zip` file
2. Place it inside your `resourcepacks` folder
3. Activate in Minecraft → Options → Resource Packs
4. Revive with Mahito’s twisted curse!

---

## 🖌️ Credits

* **Texture Artist & Pack Creator:** DeathBusterX

* **Inspiration:** Jujutsu Kaisen (Gege Akutami)
